case_title: MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. VS. XIANGFEI BAI ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND CREDIT MANAGEMENT, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAI, XIANGFEI $3,389.61 PRINCIPAL, $271.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,661.51, SEE SCANNED DOC
